hero.headline.value: AI agents ship code. I write the contracts that keep them in check.

hero.intro.value: I'm Bobby. I chase the parts of code that feel like math, and build the systems that keep AI agents inside the job you gave them.

hero.summary.value: Programmer building the governance layer for agentic systems, baked into the pipeline. Writes the contracts that make agent-authored code safe to ship: declarative, capability-scoped, enforced before deploy. Open-sourced as prx; gating production deploys at Aura.

seeking.focus.value: Senior / founding engineering on agent infrastructure: agent safety and code provenance

seeking.detail.value: Senior engineering on teams building agentic products. I bring direct experience shipping agent-authored systems and the controls that make them trustworthy in production. Brooklyn · NYC · remote.

exp.bounded-systems.what.value: Capability security for AI agents: software delivered by agents, governed like infrastructure. Generalized from my Aura work into open tooling.

exp.bounded-systems.b0.value: Move a set of separate capability-security tools into one shared, public contract that bounds an AI agent to the access it holds.

exp.aura.what.value: On Commerce, the team behind Aura's website, commerce-routing, and business-operations systems. I ship the integration and automation backbone, and built the contract-and-validation layer behind inventory-purchasing.

exp.aura.b0.value: Wrote the orchestration CLI that replaced Aura's 9-tab spreadsheet supply plan with one source of truth, compiling into dozens of downstream schema contracts checked by hundreds of test scenarios.

exp.aura.b1.value: Investigated unreviewed agent-authored commits reaching main: reconstructed each one's entry path across five log domains, authored the post-mortem, and designed the controls that became Aura's policy for shipping AI-written code.

exp.l2l.what.value: Owned the quality gates and developer experience for a 20-engineer team, spanning static-analysis CI, a design system, and frontend performance.

exp.l2l.b0.value: Shipped static-analysis gating into the PR pipeline, blocking whole defect classes at merge instead of catching them after. Critical bugs fell 20% across the team.

exp.pioneer-works.what.value: Delivered the event-planning platform for a major Brooklyn arts center.

exp.pioneer-works.b0.value: Derived event status from attached documents, not a human-set flag, across the venue's large concerts.

exp.kaleida.what.value: Automated just-in-time production for an AR and print-making studio.

exp.kaleida.b0.value: Eliminated edition-numbering errors with a database that issued serial edition IDs on request, making a duplicate impossible by construction.

exp.scope-of-work.what.value: Engineered the contact-management system for the manufacturing publication.

exp.scope-of-work.b0.value: Designed the schema that moved spreadsheet data into a relational database, so a malformed record couldn't be written.

exp.recurse-center.what.value: Type theory in Haskell, using the type system to make invalid states unrepresentable. The intellectual root of the capability work: push correctness into the boundary so violations can't compile.

exp.recurse-center.b0.value: Completed a selective 12-week programming retreat researching Haskell type theory and how a well-constrained type narrows the space of possible implementations.

proj.prx.desc.value: Agent-run pipeline that drives each work unit to a merged PR through one signed, content-addressed flow, with git-writes verified against the capability owner that holds them. Evolved from hooksmith; moved to Zod/TypeScript when the load-bearing contracts proved to be between systems, not machine and kernel.

proj.ocap-provenance.desc.value: SLSA/in-toto provenance extended with object-capability semantics: each attestation records not just who produced an artifact but which capabilities the producer held and which were denied.

work.prx.value: The agent-run work-unit CLI: capability-scoped agents whose privileged effects are verified against their signed owner, driving a work unit through one signed pipeline to a merged PR.

work.guest-room.value: Guest-agnostic room+door capability runtime — an agent reaches the outside world only through the door references it's handed.

work.claude-box.value: A capability-secured box for agent sessions — its authority is the door references it holds (keeper/scout/concierge/net), parent-agnostic.

work.door-kit.value: In-box door-client SDK for claude-box's capability doors (keeper/scout/concierge/spawn), over the guest-room protocol.

work.ocap-provenance.value: Capability-use provenance — a schema + SLSA mapping binding each privileged effect to a signed owner and an auditable chain.

work.string-audit.value: Cost-aware, grounded content auditor — typed string symbols, type-scoped audits, CAS-memoized LLM calls.
